'''Csoli-Corli''' manufactured [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Sensor/Legends|sensor systems]]. One of their products was the [[5-Node Sensor]], one of which was used aboard the [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']].

==Appearances==
*[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']] {{Reprint|Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)}} {{1st}}
